## **2.2.2.C. PI #3**

### **What initiatives were implemented or are planned that will improve this PI and how does the NSA intend on monitoring their effectiveness on performance?**

The ANSP implemented a new Requested Flight Level (RFL) monitoring tool designed to support ATCOs in identifying aircraft not adhering to the flight levels specified in the accepted flight plan. Continuous monitoring of requested versus filed flight levels is performed, with corrective actions taken as necessary to improve flight level adherence at operational positions.
